trivia_bullets.text: Masked Blackguard is an M21 original — first and only printing as of May 2026. It is a common Human Rogue (1B, 2/1) with Flash, released July 3, 2020. [Scryfall]

Flavor text (no attributed speaker): "Her footsteps are whispers, her passage a last breath." The gendered pronoun in the flavor text is consistent with the figure's presentation; the line renders assassination as silence — not a sound but an absence. [Scryfall]

Flash on a Human Rogue with a pump activation (2B: +1/+1 until end of turn) makes Masked Blackguard a surprise blocker or combat trick. In the M21 Limited format, Flash creatures at 2 mana provided tempo advantages in black-based control builds. EDHREC rank 26,643 indicates near-zero Commander adoption — a limited-focused design. [Scryfall]

Art by Bryan Sola. The composition is lit almost entirely by cool blue rim light, dissolving most of the figure into black — an art direction choice that treats the mask and the shadows as equivalent concealment. The architectural background is rendered as pure silhouette, keeping the focus on the half-face reveal above the mask line. [Scryfall]
